stemHtml:
An aircraft wishes to follow a straight track from point A to point C, passing through point B along the way. After travelling for 12 minutes, the pilot realizes that instead being over point B, the aircraft is 2 NM left and 3 NM ahead of position B. The pilot notes this fix position. How much should the aircraft heading change in order to regain the track in 12 minutes?

Planned track from point A: 035°(T)
Distance from point A to point C: 70 NM
Planned GS from point A to point C: 135 kt
Planned time between point A and point B: 12 minutes
